criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average rating given by users on app stores.

criteria.name: Number of Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of times the app has been downloaded.
criteria.sources: App Store, Google Play Store, Sensor Tower

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: Level of AI integration for personalized recommendations and music discovery.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, tech blogs

criteria.name: Music Library Size
criteria.description: Total number of songs and albums available in the app's library.

criteria.name: User Interface and Experience
criteria.description: Quality and ease of use of the app's interface.
criteria.sources: User reviews, tech blogs, expert reviews

criteria.name: Unique Features
criteria.description: Special features that set the app apart from competitors.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, tech blogs

criteria.name: Ad-Supported Free Tier
criteria.description: Availability of a free tier supported by ads.
